title: Buttery Asian Sugar Crust
description: This quick-fix polish dish features a silky butterscotch sauce and caramelized sugar crust that's both buttery and whole30-friendly.
instructions: In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Stir in maple syrup and brown sugar until fully combined.
Whisk in vanilla extract to enhance flavors.
Pour the mixture into a greased dish or pan and spread evenly for an Asian-style sugar crust.
Bake at 325°F (160°C) for about 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown. Keep warm.
To serve, pour hot whole milk over the top of the crust to create a butterscotch sauce.
